title: Are Aliens Humans From the Future?

transcript.text: 52% of the respondents contactees
experience hominid like creatures in
their kind of contact experience and
then 85% of those cases this is what I
find fascinating uh have a friendly
experience friendly or neutral
experience which might show that if they
are sort of future trans temporal humans
or something they show a a care for us
in a way that will maybe help us sort of
Ascend into them or ensure their own
sustenance in a way the one who did
interact with less human forms had a
more negative experience and so you kind
of have to break that down is it because
it was scarier is there more ontological
shock when something that looks like a a
giant bug is abducting you that can
control your mind and interact with you
telepathically and give you images and
all of these crazy downloads but it is
interesting that the most reported form
is human
